name: Command Palette Entrypoint Reliability

plain_language_summary.title: > **白話說明**：
plain_language_summary.what_changes: This step fixes how the Header Command Palette button opens the command menu. The button now calls an explicit open action instead of pretending the user pressed Ctrl+K.
plain_language_summary.why: The old shortcut-proxy path worked, but it made the button depend on global keyboard handling. A direct open action is easier to understand and less fragile.
plain_language_summary.user_visible_difference: Users should not see a feature change: the Header button still opens the palette, Ctrl+K/Cmd+K still toggles it, Escape still closes it, and existing commands still behave the same.
plain_language_summary.does_not_change: This implementation does not change backend APIs, database schema, routes, note data, frontend default API target, Pi/Caddy/service runtime, Go runtime ownership, public exposure, AI/ML features, collections, or server-side UI preference persistence.

implementation_summary.state_owner: frontend/src/stores/appStore.ts now owns command palette open/close/toggle UI state.
implementation_summary.header_entrypoint: frontend/src/components/Header.tsx opens the palette through openCommandPalette instead of dispatching a synthetic KeyboardEvent.
implementation_summary.keyboard_shortcut: frontend/src/components/CommandPalette.tsx keeps Ctrl+K/Cmd+K and Escape behavior, but routes shortcut toggling through the same store action.

success_criteria: Header command palette button opens the palette without dispatching a synthetic KeyboardEvent.
Ctrl+K / Cmd+K still toggles the palette.
Escape closes the palette and resets query/active index through the existing close path.
Palette search, Settings navigation, recent note open, new note action, and theme toggle behavior remain unchanged.
No backend API, DB schema, frontend default API target, Pi/Caddy/service, Go runtime, public exposure, AI/ML, collections, or server-side preference persistence changes.
verification_plan: Browser flow: app loads, Header palette button opens the dialog, command search navigates to Settings, Ctrl+K/Cmd+K opens/toggles, Escape closes, New Note action opens the editor, and console has no relevant app errors.
not_changed: Pi deploy or live service reload
AI/ML, collaboration, realtime, plugin platform, collections schema, or server-side UI preference persistence

allowed_next_step.title: Product Frontend Backlog Next Selection Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: Plan-only selection of the next smallest product/frontend backlog candidate, using browser evidence from current frontend behavior before implementation.
